Headline: #82 Temporary Reroute at Kimball/Bloomingdale
ShortDescription: Northbound #82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Homan, North Avenue, Kedzie, Armitage and Homan near Kimball/Bloomingdale.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Homan, North Avenue, Kedzie, Armitage and Homan due to street blockage near Kimball/Bloomingdale.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #63 63rd buses Temporary Westbound Reroute near 63rd/Campbell
